email_subject: Application for Customer Hero - Tuindecoratie - Nevele
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Customer Hero position at your company, as advertised via Michael Page International. With a strong background in customer service, digital communication, and problem-solving, I am confident in my ability to excel as the first point of contact for your clients.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I handle client inquiries via email and phone, manage CRM systems, and collaborate across departments to ensure customer satisfaction. I am experienced in handling questions, complaints, and orders with a proactive, solution-oriented approach. My technical skills in SEO, content management, and analytics allow me to optimize the customer experience and identify improvement points.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. I thrive in dynamic environments, am stress-resistant, and prioritize effectively. I am eager to bring my hands-on mentality and customer-centric mindset to your team.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to discussing how I can contribute to your company.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Customer Hero position at your company, as advertised via Michael Page International. With a strong foundation in customer service, digital communication, and a proactive, solution-oriented mindset, I am confident I can be a valuable asset to your team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I serve as a key point of contact for clients, handling inquiries via email and phone, managing orders, and resolving issues promptly. I collaborate closely with sales, logistics, and marketing teams to ensure seamless customer experiences. My experience includes optimizing CRM systems, tracking performance metrics, and identifying areas for improvement—skills directly aligned with the responsibilities of this role.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively taking classes to improve. I am digitally savvy, comfortable with various systems, and adept at prioritizing tasks in a fast-paced environment. My background also includes front-end development and logistics, which have honed my attention to detail and ability to work under pressure.

What draws me to this role is the emphasis on entrepreneurship, open communication, and a hands-on mentality. I am passionate about delivering exceptional customer service and am eager to contribute to a company that values quality and sustainability.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills and enthusiasm align with your team's goals. Thank you for considering my application.

Sincerely,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

Fluent in English and Turkish; Dutch A2 and actively improving
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Customer Service & Digital Support
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior professional with hands-on experience in customer service, digital communication, and problem-solving. At Episto, I serve as the first point of contact for clients via email and phone, handling inquiries, complaints, and orders while collaborating with sales, logistics, and marketing teams. I am proactive, solution-oriented, and digitally savvy, with strong skills in CRM systems, content management, and performance tracking. Fluent in English and Turkish; Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer service & support: handling inquiries, complaints, and orders via email, phone, and digital channels
- CRM & administration: managing client files, tracking interactions, and optimizing customer experience
- Collaboration: working cross-functionally with sales, logistics, and marketing teams
- Digital tools: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads, WordPress, Elementor
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Serve as first point of contact for client inquiries via email and phone, handling questions, complaints, and orders
- Collaborate with sales, logistics, and marketing teams to ensure seamless customer experiences
- Manage CRM systems and track customer interactions to identify improvement points
- Write keyword-targeted blog content and manage website content in WordPress
- Track performance with analytics tools to guide decision-making

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site with full content management and social media integration
- Implemented structured data and technical optimizations to improve online visibility

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
